you have new available units in the last 30 days, which you can contrast with the total availability to get an understanding of how quickly units are coming on at this property.

before we move on to the unit type tab.

Is there any way for me to understand how everybody's performing?

Perhaps if we're thinking about two beds versus two bed penthouses.

I feel like perhaps I'm losing business to them all the time.

In this case, the Ramsey.

My analysis takes me

Um Right, we don't make up units, we're not going to pull information from nowhere, right?
It has to be listed on somewhere and that somewhere right now is going to be websites.
